title: Bangalore、Karnataka — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]

content:
概述

Bangalore是Karnataka的一个城市，人口约12,340,000。India’s Silicon Valley, a global tech hub with a pleasant year-round climate, lush parks, and a thriving startup ecosystem.
